steps.name: Implement feature
steps.prompt: Implement the feature described in $file and respect the project's style.

steps.name: Write tests
steps.prompt: Add Vitest tests covering the new code. Make sure `npm test` passes.

steps.name: Coverage acceptable?
steps.condition: Run `npm test -- --coverage` and check whether overall line coverage is >= 60%. We are on attempt $runs (max 3); if we are already at attempt >= 3, release even if below the target.
steps.instructionDraft: Use `npm test -- --coverage --reporter=text-summary` and read the 'Lines' row. If >= 60%, label 'ok'. Otherwise, label 'low'. Once runs >= 3, always 'ok'.

steps.name: Update CHANGELOG
steps.prompt: Add an entry to CHANGELOG.md describing the feature and final coverage.
